sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34857" key="e)nantiotropi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναντῐο-τροπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrariety of character</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ἐθνῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:2:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
